input.initialPrompt: Analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this project. I haven't run any coverage yet.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this .NET project. They haven't run any coverage yet, so I need to:

1. Understand the project structure
2. Set up and run code coverage
3. Analyze the results

Let me start by exploring the project structure.

data.content: Good — the project already has `coverlet.collector` referenced. Let me run tests with coverage collection.
data.reasoningText: Now I have a good understanding of the project. Let me run the tests with code coverage enabled using coverlet (already referenced in the test project). I'll use Cobertura format so I can parse the results.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-5879c2b43c704a03aa9684aa38e65b0f && dotnet test --collect:\"XPlat Code Coverage\" --results-directory ./coverage-results -- DataCollectionRunSettings.DataCollectors.DataCollector.Configuration.Format=cobertura 2>&1", "description": "Run tests with code coverage", "initial_wait": 60}
